value.found_quote: Auto-review mode | `--sandbox workspace-write --ask-for-approval on-request -c approvals_reviewer=auto_review` or `approvals_reviewer = "auto_review"` | Same sandbox boundary as standard on-request mode, but eligible approval requests are reviewed by Auto-review instead of surfacing to the user.
value.rationale: The page describes Auto-review as a Codex feature where approval requests are routed through a reviewer agent (`approvals_reviewer = "auto_review"`), including a dedicated "Automatic approval reviews" section and an "Auto-review mode" entry. This substantiates OpenAI offering Auto-review. It is presented as a current, configurable feature with no indication of deprecation or sunset.
